overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a rainy futuristic city plaza and covered corridor in a video game. The player moves from an open area with a 'MARMUR BANK' sign and palm trees into a dark walkway lined with digital billboards, passing various NPCs along the way.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered plaza with palm trees and Marmur Bank signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rainy plaza toward a child standing in the pathway

notable_agents.action: child standing still in the middle of the walkway facing the camera
adult standing near the child, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: large illuminated sign with pink neon lettering mounted on a building facade
tall palm trees lining the central walkway area
low concrete seating platforms along the green walls
tall green-tinted concrete barriers with grass planters on top

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a rainy futuristic plaza beneath a large overhang. The Marmur Bank sign glows pink in the upper left while palm trees line the central path. The camera approaches a child and adult standing ahead, with wet reflective pavement and green concrete walls visible on the sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with benches and foggy skyscrapers in background

events.description: turns right from semi-covered area into more open plaza space
lighting becomes more diffuse and foggy as moving away from overhead shelter

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking along the plaza, passing groups of people sitting on benches

notable_agents.action: group of people sitting on concrete benches under the rain

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscrapers with glass facades barely visible through the fog and rain
tall cylindrical light fixtures with vertical neon illumination

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right into a more open plaza area where foggy skyscrapers loom in the background. Groups of NPCs sit on concrete benches to the right, while futuristic lamp posts provide illumination. The Marmur Bank sign and green walls fall behind as the scene opens up to the rainy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with digital billboards and glass ceiling

events.description: enters covered corridor from open plaza, transitioning from outdoor to indoor space
lighting shifts from natural foggy ambience to artificial neon and digital screen illumination

agents.ego_description: walking into the covered corridor, passing pedestrians with umbrellas including one with a glowing blue canopy

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying a glowing blue umbrella walking toward the camera

entered.detail: overhead metal and glass ceiling structure covering the walkway
tall vertical digital advertisement screens displaying fashion models
dark concrete walls lining both sides of the covered passage

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered walkway corridor, transitioning from the open rain to a sheltered space with a glass and metal ceiling. Digital billboards displaying advertisements line the walls, and the lighting shifts to artificial neon. Pedestrians with umbrellas pass by, including one with a distinctive glowing blue umbrella.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed corridor with graffiti and digital advertisements approaching exit

events.description: graffiti reading DIE DIE DIE becomes visible on the right wall as moving deeper into corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the darker enclosed section of the corridor toward the bright exit, passing a man and child ahead

notable_agents.action: man and small child walking ahead toward the corridor exit

entered.detail: white spray-painted text reading DIE DIE DIE on the dark corridor wall
large illuminated advertisement screen visible at the corridor exit

segments.scene_description: The camera moves deeper into the enclosed corridor where the lighting becomes darker and more neon-dominated. Graffiti reading DIE DIE DIE appears on the right wall. Digital billboards are now closer on both sides, and the corridor leads toward a bright exit where a large digital screen and outdoor light are visible at the end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rainy, open-air futuristic plaza into a dark, neon-lit sheltered corridor. It begins beneath a large overhang where a pink Marmur Bank sign glows above palm trees and wet, reflective pavement. As the camera turns right, the scene opens into a wider plaza with foggy skyscrapers looming in the distance and NPCs resting on concrete benches under futuristic lamp posts. The movement then transitions from the open rain into a covered walkway with a glass and metal ceiling, where the lighting shifts to artificial neon and pedestrians pass by with glowing umbrellas. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the enclosed space past graffiti-covered walls and close-set digital billboards, heading toward a bright exit illuminated by a large digital screen.
